name: What's my case worth if Google AI Overview malpractice cost me a settlement in Houston?
description: Lost settlement value + costs; $50K+ often, expert needed.[2]

mainEntity.name: What's my case worth if Google AI Overview malpractice cost me a settlement in Houston?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lost settlement value + costs; $50K+ often, expert needed.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Value equals lost settlement minus litigation costs, plus emotional distress if applicable, calculated via expert economist testimony on but-for damages from AI negligence. NY precedents support sanctions implying liability.[2] Factors: provable economic loss, jurisdiction caps (none in TX for malpractice). $50K-$500K+ typical for mid-size cases. Get free valuation from malpractice firm using your docs.
